/usr/bin/c++  -pthread -Wall -O2 -g -fcoroutines -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/corpcron_server.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/corpcron_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/corpcron_server.dir/src/common/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/corpcron_server.dir/src/common/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/corpcron_server.dir/src/common/memory_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/corpcron_server.dir/src/common/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/corpcron_server.dir/src/net/epoll_loop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/corpcron_server.dir/src/net/tcp_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/corpcron_server.dir/src/redis/redis_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/corpcron_server.dir/src/mysql/mysql_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/corpcron_server.dir/src/rpc/handler_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/corpcron_server.dir/src/scheduler/cron_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/corpcron_server.dir/src/scheduler/task_scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/corpcron_server.dir/src/rpc.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/corpcron_server.dir/src/rpc/rpc_client.cpp.o -o corpcron_server  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so -lpthread -lhiredis -lmysqlcppconn
